ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "chipset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chipset associated with the driver */,
  "integration_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the integration type of the driver */,
  "non_free_firmware_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if non-free firmware is required */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license type for the driver */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original developer of the driver */,
  "development_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current development status of the driver */,
  "driver_metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata about the driver */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the driver was integrated into the system */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification to the driver record */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the driver is currently active or deprecated */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the driver has been downloaded */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to the driver's documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_development_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("development_status_id") REFERENCES development_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_integration_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("integration_type_id") REFERENCES integration_types ("integration_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_chipset_id FOREIGN KEY ("chipset_id") REFERENCES chipsets ("chipset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chipsets" (
  "chipset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chipset */,
  "chipset_name" TEXT /* Name of the chipset */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the chipset */,
  "chipset_metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata about the chipset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the chipset */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the chipset record */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the chipset is currently active */,
  "chipset_type" TEXT /* Type of the chipset (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chipset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the developer is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., Lead Developer, Junior Developer) */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the developer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the developer (e.g., Active, Inactive, On Leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_types" (
  "integration_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration type */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integration method */,
  "integration_metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata about the integration type */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the integration type record */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the integration type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type/category of the license */,
  "license_metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata about the license */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the license record */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the license is currently active */,
  "commercial_use_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the license allows commercial use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the development status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the development status */,
  "status_metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata about the development status */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the development status record */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the development status is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver associated with the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the driver */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "version_metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata about the driver version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Summary of changes in the version */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Link to download the driver version */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the version has been downloaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification to the version record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_versions_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)
